payload.answer: I can’t safely commit a durable current-employment memory because the input contains two potentially conflicting claims: Sam works at Goldman and Sam joined Point72. Please clarify whether Sam currently works at Goldman, currently works at Point72, moved from Goldman to Point72, or holds both roles.

entity_resolution.reason: Input appears to contain two concurrent employment-related claims about Sam with insufficient punctuation or temporal context to determine whether Goldman is current, Point72 is current, or one supersedes the other.

details: Detected ambiguous concurrent writes due to missing punctuation or temporal markers.
No durable current employment fact should be committed without clarification.

repair_options: Treat as a job transition: Sam previously worked at Goldman and joined Point72 as the current employer.
Treat as two concurrent roles: Sam works at Goldman and also joined Point72.
Treat Goldman as current and Point72 as an additional historical or ambiguous affiliation.
Treat Point72 as current and Goldman as a former employer.
Do not store either employment fact until clarified.
